mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.seller_id, u.nickname AS seller_nickname, u.avatar AS seller_avatar, p.category_id, c.name AS category_name, p.title, p.description, p.price, p.currency, p.stock, p.image, p.images, p.shipping_address, p.status, p.audit_status, p.audit_remark, p.risk_level, p.restricted_flag, p.view_count, p.create_time FROM product p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.seller_id = u.id LEFT JOIN category c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE p.id = #{id} AND p.deleted = 0

SELECT p.id, p.seller_id, u.nickname AS seller_nickname, u.avatar AS seller_avatar, p.category_id, c.name AS category_name, p.title, p.description, p.price, p.currency, p.stock, p.image, p.images, p.shipping_address, p.status, p.audit_status, p.audit_remark, p.risk_level, p.restricted_flag, p.view_count, p.create_time FROM product p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.seller_id = u.id LEFT JOIN category c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE p.id = #{id} AND p.deleted = 0 AND p.status = 'ON_SALE' AND p.stock > 0
